params.SpellDescription: Add X mana of any one color, where X is CARDNAME's power. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells with mana value 4 or greater or creature spells with {X} in their mana costs.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add X mana of any one color, where X is CARDNAME's power. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells with mana value 4 or greater or creature spells with {X} in their mana costs.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value 4 or greater, you draw a card, gain 1 life, and put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
